payload.title: New York City Transit Key Performance Metrics
payload.description: Key performance metrics report prepared for the April 2024 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City. 45,000 employees serve 4,500,000 passengers a day. Operates nearly 6,700 subway cars and 5,800 buses, maintains 472 subway stations, 640 miles of track, 28 bus depots and 70 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Richard Davey, President of New York City Transit

payload.description: Primary policing agency in NYCT Subways

tool_args.label: Jamie Torres-Springer, President MTA Construction & Development

payload.description: MTA paratransit service

tool_args.label: Sheila Hutson, VP & Chief Stations Officer
Rachel Cohen, Acting Vice President of Paratransit

payload.title: Acting Vice President of Paratransit for New York City Transit starting in May

tool_args.label: Chris Pangilinan, Chief of Operations Planning at NYCT

payload.title: Chief of Operations Planning at NYCT

payload.description: City-wide signup blitz for Fair Fares program with tabling at five locations including four Customer Service Centers in all five boroughs

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

tool_args.label: One Year Anniversary of Station Agents Out of Booth

payload.description: Celebrated a full year of over two thousand station agents delivering enhanced customer service outside of the booth
First battery-electric Access-A-Ride van entered passenger service, debuted at Bowling Green Park

tool_args.label: Group Station Manager Office Hours Program

payload.description: New Office Hours program where Group Station Managers will meet with customers directly twice a month during morning or evening rush

payload.status: completed on time and on budget
payload.description: Major track reconstruction project on the 63rd St line between Queens and Manhattan, completed in April 2024

First ever battery-electric AAR van debuted at Bowling Green Park, entered passenger service on April 15, 2024. First of 15 electric vans and cutaway buses to enter service in a pilot program for AAR this year.

Deployment of 60 standard 40-foot battery-electric buses (BEBs) operating out of four depots. Includes first agency-owned standard 40-foot electric buses, first in-depot overhead pantograph chargers, first partnership with NY Power Authority for charger installation.
Award of 205 low-floor BEBs further advancing zero-emissions goal

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Av / Lorimer St Elevator Project

payload.project_name: Metropolitan Av / Lorimer St elevator project
payload.description: Opened new elevators at Metropolitan Av G and Lorimer St L stations in Brooklyn. Included constructing six new elevators, updated staircases, lighting, and extensive fare control and platform work.

tool_args.label: Bus Customer Journey Time Performance March 2024
Subway Customer Journey Time Performance March 2024
Customer satisfaction with station agents outside booth

payload.description: Customers who interact with station agents outside of the booth who are satisfied with their experience
Customer commendations for station agents shot up roughly 600% to 208 in the past twelve months

tool_args.label: Crime down over 30% over last four weeks

payload.raw_value_text: down over 30% compared to last year
down 36% compared to the same period last year
down 22% from the comparative month a year prior

payload.entity_name: New York City Transit & Bus Committee

tool_args.label: Fair Fares Day of Action partners

payload.claim_text: The Fair Fares Day of Action was in partnership with the Mayor's Office of Public Engagement, the NYC Department of Social Services (DSS) and NYC Human Resources Administration (HRA).
payload.subject: Fair Fares Day of Action
payload.description: Partnership with City agencies for city-wide signup blitz

payload.claim_text: In 2022, the MTA and TWU entered into a landmark agreement to reimagine the role of customer service in the subway system, bringing station agents primarily out of the booth to support customers throughout the station environment, and announcing a new Customer Service Center model.
payload.subject: station agent role reimagination
payload.description: Landmark 2022 agreement between MTA and TWU to bring station agents out of token booths

payload.claim_text: We remain committed to transitioning the entire bus fleet to zero-emissions by 2040
payload.subject: MTA bus fleet
payload.description: Commitment to transition entire bus fleet to zero-emissions by 2040

tool_args.label: Reduced-Fare MetroCard at Customer Service Centers

payload.claim_text: Seniors can apply for and receive their permanent Reduced-Fare MetroCard on the spot at Customer Service Centers.
payload.subject: Reduced-Fare MetroCard
payload.description: Seniors can now apply and receive permanent Reduced-Fare MetroCard at any CSC, previously only available at 3 Stone St, Mobile Sales Van, or online/mail

payload.description: Fare evasion data for subway and bus for January-March 2024 not available at time of report

payload.description: Reportable subway and bus customer accident data for March 2024 not available
